mapper.select:
SELECT CODE_ID, CODE_NM, CODE_TYPE, USE_YN, ORDER_NO FROM TM_CODE WHERE 1=1
AND (CODE_ID LIKE '%' || #{SEARCH_KEYWORD} || '%' OR CODE_NM LIKE '%' || #{SEARCH_KEYWORD} || '%')
ORDER BY CODE_TYPE, ORDER_NO

SELECT BD.BOARD_ID, BD.TITLE, BD.CONTENT, BD.MEMBER_ID, BD.USE_YN, TO_CHAR(BD.REG_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') AS REG_DT FROM TM_BOARD BD WHERE 1=1
AND BD.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{SEARCH_KEYWORD} || '%'
ORDER BY BD.REG_DT DESC
SELECT MENU_ID, MENU_NM, PARENT_MENU_ID, MENU_URL, USE_YN, ORDER_NO FROM TM_MENU WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY PARENT_MENU_ID, ORDER_NO

SELECT LL.LOG_ID, LL.MEMBER_ID, LL.COMPANY_ID, TC.COMPANY_NM, LL.LOGIN_IP, LL.LOGIN_ST, TO_CHAR(LL.LOGIN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS LOGIN_DT FROM TM_LOGIN_LOG LL, TM_COMPANY TC WHERE LL.COMPANY_ID = TC.COMPANY_ID(+) AND LL.LOGIN_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{START_DT} || '00:00:00', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{END_DT} || '23:59:59', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS')
AND LL.MEMBER_ID LIKE '%' || #{MEMBER_ID} || '%'
ORDER BY LL.LOGIN_DT DESC

SELECT SL.LOG_ID, SL.MEMBER_ID, SL.COMPANY_ID, TC.COMPANY_NM, SL.SEARCH_TYPE, SL.SEARCH_KEY, TO_CHAR(SL.SEARCH_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS SEARCH_DT FROM TM_SEARCH_LOG SL, TM_COMPANY TC WHERE SL.COMPANY_ID = TC.COMPANY_ID(+) AND SL.SEARCH_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{START_DT} || '00:00:00', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{END_DT} || '23:59:59', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') ORDER BY SL.SEARCH_DT DESC

SELECT AH.HIST_ID, AH.MEMBER_ID, AH.BEFORE_AUTH, AH.AFTER_AUTH, AH.CHG_MEMBER_ID, TO_CHAR(AH.CHG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CHG_DT FROM TM_ACCOUNT_HISTORY AH WHERE AH.CHG_DT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{START_DT} || '00:00:00', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') AND TO_DATE(#{END_DT} || '23:59:59', 'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS')
AND AH.MEMBER_ID LIKE '%' || #{MEMBER_ID} || '%'
ORDER BY AH.CHG_DT DESC

SELECT WORK_CD, STAMP_PER, STAMP_AMT, REGIST_PER, REGIST_AMT, STAMP_BASE, REGIST_BASE, ACQ1_PER, ACQ2_PER, ACQ3_PER, ACQ210_PER, ACQ211_PER, ACQ0_PER FROM TM_TAX WHERE WORK_CD = #{WORK_CD} AND sysdate between start_dt and end_dt AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT WORK_CD, COMPANY_ID, GOVT_ID, PERM_GB, PAYMENT_GB, PAYMENT_OP, PAYMENT_TP, PAYMENT_ME, FEE, USE_YN FROM TM_WORK_CP WHERE COMPANY_ID = #{COMPANY_ID} AND WORK_CD = #{WORK_CD} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
